title: stylidium brunonianum var. minor
intro: Stylidium brunonianum var. minor, commonly known as the small or yellow spike, is a rare and unique species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Stylidiaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stylidium brunonianum var. minor include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea or by drying and processing them into capsules or tablets for consumption.
